heading: Copies of Statutes at Large
label: 144 Copies of Statutes at Large
text: Ten of the copies of the Statutes at Large, published by Little, Brown & Co., which were deposited in the Library prior to , shall be retained by the Librarian for the use of the justices of the Supreme Court, during the terms of court.February 5, 1859
notes: CodificationR.S. § 96 derived from , .act Feb. 5, 1859, ch. 22, § 1111 Stat. 381
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 96 derived from , .act Feb. 5, 1859, ch. 22, § 1111 Stat. 381
